summary: Shifted the opening a beat later into Lantern Quay's hands-on unloading so Chapter 9 no longer repeats Chapter 8's arrival scaffold, while preserving the existing overnight page handoff into Chapter 10.
edits: Reframed the first paragraph around the Dey aunt thrusting a bucket at Daro before the mooring is finished.
Kept the page-reveal and dawn wait unchanged because they already hand cleanly into Chapter 10's first-light ledger scene.
